Package org.eventb.internal.core.pog

Class PredicateTable<PE extends ISCPredicateElement>

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.tool.state.State
org.eventb.internal.core.pog.PredicateTable<PE>
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPOGState, IPredicateTable<PE>, IState
Direct Known Subclasses:
ContextAxiomTable, EventGuardTable, MachineInvariantTable
public abstract class PredicateTable<PE extends ISCPredicateElement> extends State implements IPredicateTable<PE>

    Returns the predicate elements contained in this predicate table.

    Returns the parsed and type-checked predicates corresponding to the predicate elements contained in this table.

    indexOfPredicate(Predicate predicate)
    Returns the index of the specified predicate in the predicate array, or -1 if the predicate is not contained in the array.

    • getElements

      public List<PE> getElements()
      Description copied from interface: IPredicateTable
      Returns the predicate elements contained in this predicate table.
      Specified by:
      getElements in interface IPredicateTable<PE extends ISCPredicateElement>
      Returns:
      the predicate elements contained in this predicate table

    • getPredicates

      public List<Predicate> getPredicates()
      Description copied from interface: IPredicateTable
      Returns the parsed and type-checked predicates corresponding to the predicate elements contained in this table.

      The indices of this list correspond to the indices of the list of predicate elements returned by getElements().

      Specified by:
      getPredicates in interface IPredicateTable<PE extends ISCPredicateElement>
      Returns:
      the parsed and type-checked predicates corresponding to the predicate elements contained in this table

    • indexOfPredicate

      public int indexOfPredicate(Predicate predicate)
      Description copied from interface: IPredicateTable
      Returns the index of the specified predicate in the predicate array, or -1 if the predicate is not contained in the array.
      Specified by:
      indexOfPredicate in interface IPredicateTable<PE extends ISCPredicateElement>
      Parameters:
      predicate - the predicate to search
      Returns:
      the index of the specified predicate in the predicate array, or -1 if the predicate is not contained in the array
